$description: Catalog of web-component recipe ids whose game-over flow benefits from a public leaderboard. Read at runtime by macOS ScoringGameClassifier — drives the 'Add Leaderboard' enhancement-offer pill on the post-success message. Add a new recipe id here when its golden assembly ships with score / streak / win state. Zero-rebuild update: edit + git push, then refreshMchataisourceCache (or copy into source-cache for local testing).
